Interface IXMLReader3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control the sequential reading of XML.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("1B8A0010-70D1-4461-8F53-230FE5DC42ED")]
public interface IXMLReader3 : IXMLReader2, IXMLReader
